macro_note: US-Israel struck Iran Feb 28. Hormuz closed. Brent crude $104–$122/bbl. FIIs sold ₹1.04L cr CY2026.

signals.title: MRPL: Crude Input Cost Explosion
signals.summary: Brent at $104–$122/bbl. MRPL is a PSU refiner — input costs up 50–75%. Government blocked cost pass-through via ₹10/L excise cut. Q4 GRM will collapse.
signals.action: Do NOT add. Stop loss: ₹160. Check Q4 earnings ~May 2026.
signals.source: Brent crude CNN/CNBC Mar 27; MRPL LTP ₹181.65
